core_mechanism: inverse reconstruction of an unknown monotone rate/history function from a set of cumulative (integral) observables, using reference standards of known intrinsic scale ('standard candles/rulers') whose measured apparent-to-intrinsic ratio inverts into an accumulated-distance measure
brief_reason: Although a review, the shared machinery across its probes is inferring one underlying expansion-rate history by inverting distance observables built from sources of known intrinsic brightness (luminosity distances) or known intrinsic length (angular/acoustic scale rulers) plus their integrated effect on the growth of fluctuations.
